description.content: CRUD operations on NoSQL collection documents

item.name: Codehooks List documents in a collection

request.name: Codehooks List documents in a collection

description.content: Retrieve documents from a collection with optional query parameters for filtering, sorting, pagination, and field selection. Supports both simple key-value query parameters and advanced NoSQL JSON query syntax via the q parameter.

query.description: Advanced NoSQL JSON query object (URL-encoded). Supports MongoDB-like operators such as $gt, $gte, $lt, $lte, $ne, $in, $nin, $exists, $regex, $or, and $and.
Query hints as a JSON object (URL-encoded). Supports fields, sort, skip, limit, and projection.
Maximum number of documents to return
Number of documents to skip in the result set
Comma-separated list of fields to sort by. Prefix with - for descending order.
Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

variable.description: (Required) The name of the collection to query
The project ID assigned to your Codehooks project
The datastore space name (e.g. dev, staging, prod)

response.name: A list of documents matching the query

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
The project ID assigned to your Codehooks project
The datastore space name (e.g. dev, staging, prod)

The Codehooks.io Database REST API provides a complete and secure REST API for basic database CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on NoSQL collections. The API supports querying with MongoDB-like syntax, pagination, sorting, and field selection. It also includes a key-value store for caching and fast lookups, and a queue system for asynchronous job processing. All endpoints are prefixed with the project ID and datastore space name.

Contact Support:
 Name: Codehooks
